learning_claim_guard.reason: bounded learning-likely claims require full same-eval reason/digest coverage, placeholder-free external reports, an active evidence bundle, and explicit unlock review; confirmed learning-improvement claims require the stricter confirmed-improvement lane

blockers.message: release closeout component evidence does not form a single strict source-tree cohort.
required_evidence: Regenerate release evidence in one closeout chain or document why fingerprint divergence is acceptable.
blockers.closure_action: Rerun release evidence in one ordered closeout chain before release signoff.
blockers.rollback_trigger: Treat source tree coherence attention as a blocker if component fingerprints are missing.

auto_improve_blockers.message: goal worktree guard is not promotable: goal worktree guard status=attention; requested_mode=git; detected_mode=git_worktree; can_execute_goal_runtime=true; can_promote_result=false; dirty_entry_count=84

can_promote_result must stay false while the worktree guard is missing, dirty, replay-only, or fatal.

advisory_backlog.message: strict external report release check is unavailable because no current distribution ZIP was provided in this non-sealed closeout
required_evidence: Run make release-evidence-closeout-sealed before sealed release signoff.
advisory_backlog.closure_action: Rerun the sealed closeout lane with a current distribution ZIP before external review signoff.
